changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_CATEGORIES START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE CATEGORIES ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, USER_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, NAME VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, DESCRIPTION VARCHAR2(500), COLOR VARCHAR2(7) DEFAULT '#6366F1', ICON VARCHAR2(50) DEFAULT 'book', CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_CATEGORIES PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_CATEGORIES_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES USERS (ID), CONSTRAINT UQ_CATEGORIES_USER_NAME UNIQUE (USER_ID, NAME), CONSTRAINT CK_CATEGORIES_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)), CONSTRAINT CK_CATEGORIES_COLOR CHECK (REGEXP_LIKE(COLOR, '^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$')) )

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IDX_CATEGORIES_USER_ID ON CATEGORIES (USER_ID); CREATE INDEX IDX_CATEGORIES_ACTIVE ON CATEGORIES (USER_ID, ACTIVE);
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IDX_CATEGORIES_USER_ID; DROP INDEX IDX_CATEGORIES_ACTIVE;
